title: pouteria celebica
intro: Pouteria celebica, also known as the Philippine walnut tree, is a species of plant in the family Sapotaceae. It has been traditionally used in various medicinal and culinary purposes, particularly for its medicinal properties in treating fever, rheumatism, and diarrhea. The plant's bark, seeds, and leaves have been used to prepare herbal remedies that offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion. In herbal preparations, Pouteria celebica is often used as an infusion or decoction to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
